# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest version of Class Action Sentinel is supported for security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.0.x   | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of this project seriously. If you believe you have found a security vulnerability, please report it to us by opening a private security advisory on GitHub or by contacting the maintainers directly.

Please do not report security vulnerabilities via public GitHub issues.

### Response Time

We will acknowledge receipt of your report within 48 hours and provide a timeline for resolution as soon as possible.
